final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial macro photograph of a water droplet reflection for a phone wallpaper.

Style/medium: macro photography, shallow depth of field, photorealistic
Composition: extreme close-up macro shot, centered droplet filling 30% of frame, low angle at grass level
Subject: single pristine water droplet with inverted landscape reflection inside, surrounded by grass blades and smaller dew drops
Scene/backdrop: early morning meadow, soft circular bokeh (bokeh balls) in background from out-of-focus light sources
Lighting/mood: soft diffused morning sunlight, gentle backlight creating translucency in droplet, serene and delicate
Color palette: fresh greens as dominant, cool blue-white bokeh circles as accent, warm golden rim light on droplet
Materials/textures: glassy spherical water surface with internal refraction, dewy grass blades with fine serrations
Avoid: oversaturated colors, artificial-looking bokeh, water droplet with no visible reflection, harsh shadows, 8K stuffer terms
